songs.name: Zelda's Lullaby
songs.notes: C - Z - C - C - Z - C
songs.function: Used to open the Door of Time and to activate certain devices and unlock shrines.
songs.location: Learned from Princess Zelda in Hyrule Castle.

songs.name: Saria's Song
songs.notes: S - S - S - C - S - S - C
songs.function: Used to communicate with Saria and to calm certain creatures.
songs.location: Learned from Saria in the Sacred Forest Meadow.

songs.name: Song of Time
songs.notes: C - C - Z - C - C - Z
songs.function: Used to open the Door of Time and to move large blocks.
songs.location: Learned in the Temple of Time.

songs.name: Song of Storms
songs.notes: C - S - C - S - C - S
songs.function: Used to create rain and to fill empty ponds.
songs.location: Learned from the Windmill Man in Kakariko Village.

songs.name: Epona's Song
songs.notes: S - C - C - S - C - C
songs.location: Learned from a cow in Lon Lon Ranch.

songs.name: Bolero of Fire
songs.notes: C - S - Z - S - C - Z
songs.function: Warps you to Death Mountain Crater.
songs.location: Learned from the Great Fairy in Death Mountain Crater.

songs.name: Minuet of Forest
songs.notes: S - Z - S - C - C - S
songs.function: Warps you to the Sacred Forest Meadow.
songs.location: Learned from the Great Fairy in the Forest Temple.

songs.name: Requiem of Spirit
songs.notes: C - S - C - Z - S - Z
songs.function: Warps you to the Desert Colossus.
songs.location: Learned from the Great Fairy in the Spirit Temple.

songs.name: Nocturne of Shadow
songs.notes: C - S - C - C - Z - S
songs.function: Warps you to the Shadow Temple.
songs.location: Learned from the Great Fairy in Kakariko Village.

songs.name: Prelude of Light
songs.notes: C - C - Z - C - Z - S
songs.function: Warps you to the Temple of Time.
songs.location: Learned from the Great Fairy in the Temple of Time.

songs.name: Song of Time
songs.notes: C - C - Z - C - C - Z
songs.function: Used to open the Door of Time and to manipulate time-based objects.
songs.location: Learned in the Temple of Time.

songs.name: Sun's Song
songs.notes: C - Z - S - C - Z - S
songs.function: Changes day to night or night to day.
songs.location: Learned in the Graveyard by playing the song for a tombstone.
